articles.title: Domestic travel best option for Malaysians during school holidays
articles.summary: KUALA LUMPUR: With the escalating cost of international travel due to the Middle East conflict, Cuti-Cuti Malaysia appears to be the best option for Malaysians during this school holidays. Read full s

articles.title: Elderly man dies in Sandakan house fire
articles.summary: SANDAKAN: An elderly man was found burnt to death after a house fire at Kampung Mumiang here on Tuesday night (March 24) with firefighters facing delays in reaching the scene due to access constraints

articles.title: Bomba records 87 cases of open fires within a week in Pahang
articles.summary: KUANTAN: The Pahang Fire and Rescue Department (JBPM) reported 87 open fires over seven days from March 18 to yesterday. Read full story

articles.title: Seven-year-old boy dies after being hit by car in Kota Kuala Muda
articles.summary: SUNGAI PETANI: A seven-year-old boy was killed after being hit by a car while crossing the road along Jalan Kota Kuala Muda near here last night. Read full story

articles.title: 15 heat-related cases, one child death reported nationwide
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: A total of 15 heat-related cases, including one death, have been reported nationwide this year, says the Health Ministry. Read full story

articles.title: Five Thai crew injured in cargo vessel fire off Tanjung Sedili
articles.summary: KOTA TINGGI: Five Thai male crew members suffered burn injuries, some of which were categorised as serious, after a fire broke out on board a cargo vessel. Read full story
